userProfile.title: UserProfile
userProfile.description: Public and private metadata for an authenticated user.

displayName.description: User's full name from authentication provider.

savedReport.title: SavedReport
savedReport.description: A saved TextLens rhetorical analysis report.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the report.

name.description: Document title or custom name of the report.

summaryJudgement.description: A summary judgement of the rhetorical audit.

/users/{userId}.description: Root collection for authenticated user profiles.

/users/{userId}/reports/{reportId}.description: Nested collection of TextLens audit reports saved by the user.
